catalog.shortDescription: Connect your guild to Discord. Let roles be earned, not assigned.
catalog.longDescription: The Discord module bridges your on-chain systems with your Discord server. Roles are automatically assigned based on conditions and holdings.

docs.overview: This module connects your guild to Discord and automates community roles based on blockchain data.
docs.mechanics:
Users link wallets

Conditions determine role assignment

Sync runs periodically

Works across multiple guilds
docs.setup:
Invite bot

Connect server

Define roles

Apply conditions

Activate sync

activationInstructions.intro: Bridge your guildhall and your Discord keep. Let roles be earned, not granted.
steps: Configure your roles in the Discord server
Add a role to your conditionsets
